description: A robotics engineer needs a custom V-groove pulley for a belt-driven robot drive train. Create a V-groove pulley wheel in FreeCAD with a 60 mm outer diameter, 15 mm total width, and an 8 mm diameter center bore through-hole along the central rotation axis. The V-groove must be centered on the wheel width, running around the full outer circumference, with an isosceles triangle cross-section featuring a 60-degree included angle at the apex and a 5 mm radial depth. Save the document to ~/Documents/FreeCAD/vgroove_pulley.FCStd and export the part as a STEP file to ~/Documents/FreeCAD/vgroove_pulley.step.
